title: rubus bellatus
intro: Rubus bellatus, also known as the fragrant raspberry or bellflower raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the mountainous regions of western China and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, primarily due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus bellatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
